entries.title: Exposition on Psalm 19
entries.excerpt: To the end, a psalm of David himself. It is a well-known title; nor does the Lord Jesus Christ say what follows, but it is said of Him. The heavens tell out the glory of God Psalm 18:1. The righteous Evangelists, in whom, as in the heavens, God dwells, set forth the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ, or the glory wherewith the Son glorified the Father upon earth. And the firmament shows forth the works of His hands. And the firmament shows forth the deeds of the Lord's power, that now made heaven by the assurance of the Holy Ghost, which before was earth by fear. Day unto day utters word Psalm…
